arts.ttl: Crystal Palace want to sign ‘next Michael Olise’
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are reportedly eager to win the race for the transfer of Sunderland wonderkid Chris Rigg this summer. The Eagles are the latest of a long list of Premier League clubs to be linked with Rigg, who is widely regarded as one of the biggest prospects in the country. Still only 17 years of […] The post Crystal Palace want to sign ‘next Michael Olise’ appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Crystal Palace Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Newcastle, currently vying for a Champions League spot, host Crystal Palace, who sit comfortably in mid-table, in a Premier League clash at St James' Park on Wednesday, April 16th, with kick-off sched...

arts.ttl: Jason Tindall's hidden Newcastle United tweak when downing Man United should worry Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Meanwhile, the decision to move Harvey Barnes and Jacob Murphy forward when out of possession, coupled with some Manchester United players losing their footing, helped Tindall's men regain - and then extend - their lead as the game went on. Jason Tindall may be known for his touchline antics in the shadow of Eddie Howe - but the stand-in gaffer has already shown Crystal Palace and any future Newcastle United opponents his tactical nous in the short period of time since stepping into his colleague's shoes.

arts.ttl: Newcastle's £175m incentive after Jamie Carragher tips Mags for runners-up slot
arts.sum: Newcastle United go into battle for third spot against Crystal Palace tonight and are now in with a great shout of grabbing one of the Premier League's Champions League places this season. In the build-up to the Palace clash Sky Sports pundit Jamie Carragher threw Newcastle into contention for second place in the Premier League after he was enthused by the 4-1 win over Man United .

arts.ttl: Newcastle rivals to see PIF flex with 'exciting' development PSR can't stop
arts.sum: Newcastle United had just announced plans to extend the club's current training ground, but the Magpies reiterated that work to identify a new site for a future facility 'continues' in the first line of the accompanying statement. As much as Newcastle are looking to get the very most out of their Benton base with further improvement works, including additional support facilities, an enlarged players' area and new office and meeting space, the black-and-whites' long-term goal remains unchanged.

arts.ttl: Advantage to Arsenal or Liverpool? Newcastle would have to smash transfer record for 29 G/A star
arts.sum: Newcastle United might realistically be out of the race for the transfer of Eintracht Frankfurt striker Hugo Ekitike due to his asking price. The talented young Frenchman is enjoying a superb season, contributing an impressive 21 goals and eight assists in all competitions in total. Arsenal and Liverpool are among Ekitike’s transfer suitors, as CaughtOffside […] The post Advantage to Arsenal or Liverpool? Newcastle would have to smash transfer record for 29 G/A star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Crystal Palace Predicted Starting Lineups for Premier League Match Amid Howe Update
arts.sum: Newcastle and Crystal Palace will go head-to-head in the Premier League at St James' Park on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Seven players could miss Newcastle United vs Crystal Palace after Jason Tindall injury update
arts.sum: Newcastle United are back in Premier League action tomorrow night when they take on Crystal Palace at St. James' Park. Jason Tindall will take charge for a second consecutive game, with Newcastle yet to set a clear timeframe for Eddie Howe’s return to the dugout.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United target Liam Delap 'set to snub' Premier League giants over key reason
arts.sum: Liam Delap looks set to snub a potential summer transfer to Manchester United, dealing a significant setback to the struggling Premier League side - and opening the door to others. Despite Man United's clear interest in Delap, the 22-year-old is reportedly having second thoughts about joining the beleaguered club.

arts.ttl: Howe has made Isak 'so hard to stop' - Kuol
arts.sum: Newcastle United winger Garang Kuol believes Eddie Howe's high-energy tactical approach has got the best out of Alexander Isak this season.
